name: horatio
description: Horatio — a flight recorder for MCP-driven Blender work: capture all Blender MCP traffic, distill it with NVIDIA Nemotron into persistent per-file memory, and serve it back to agents via MCP.

scripts.desktop: npm run build && npm run dev --prefix desktop
scripts.desktop:build: npm run build && npm run build --prefix desktop
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run build && npm run dist --prefix desktop
scripts.desktop:dist:dir: npm run build && npm run dist:dir --prefix desktop
